text: Hey guys, it's Dr. Mario Leyva.
I'm going to show you a video on a remnant cholecystectomy that I completed.
This patient had prior surgery about ten years ago.
She's been in the ER about ten to twelve times in the last couple years with a remnant gallbladder demonstrating gallstones.
She's had a hard time finding someone in the community to remove her gallbladder.
I saw her in clinic and evaluated the images and discussed with her the potential for removal.
